summary: Terminal CPMG N=8 completed and was reviewed. The project objective is satisfied: reimage1804_c02 is the accepted aligned NV; T2star is short/few-us order (~2-3 us, method-sensitive); Ramsey plus terminal CPMG target-region evidence supports likely weak/moderate nearby-13C-like coupling without precise coupling extraction. No bridge queue mutation was performed in this wake; project lifecycle was marked completed.
